problem.title: DLIO trade-off on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)
problem.question: Which DLIO profile on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: Baseline DLIO-style GICP keyframe odometry with default IMU/LiDAR fusion weights.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser downsampling, fewer GICP iterations, lighter IMU fusion influence.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer voxels, deeper GICP, stronger IMU term when imu.csv is present.
